name: Fire in the Hole!
description: This joke is not funny anymore. Made by JeremyGamer13.

description: Save variables, lists and extra info to a file, then load those things back in.

name: GitHub API
description: Fetch IDs, Description, etc. from Repositories, Users and Organizations. Originally found on DinosaurMod.
